Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 1 Understand User Input Part 1 Normative Process Behavior Strict Rules Sequence Application Received Credit Check Risk Assessment Loan Decision Inform Applicant If Approved Finalize Documentation Close Case Event Log Case 1 Follows strict sequence perfectly Approved path All steps in order Case 2 App RA CC LD Rejected Finalize Close Case 3 App CC RA LD Approved Inform Finalize Close

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 2 Analyze Case by Case against Normative Rules Case 1 Sequence App CC RA LD Approved Inform Finalize Close Matches exactly Normative Violations None Case 2 Sequence App RA CC LD Rejected Finalize Close Violations 1 Risk Assessment performed before Credit Check violates ordering rule 2 Finalize Documentation performed after a Rejection violates rule If rejected do not finalize documentation Case 3 Sequence App CC RA LD Approved Inform Finalize Close Matches strict sequence Normative Violations None

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 3 Analyze Case by Case against Desiderata Case 1 CC within 24h Yes 05h Inform within 48h Yes 2h Follow-up Call Missing Case 2 CC within 24h Yes 1h Inform within 48h Missing entirely Follow-up Call Missing Case 3 CC within 24h No 2 days Inform within 48h No 4 days Follow-up Call Missing

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Case 2 goes App RA CC LD Rejected Finalize Close It skips Inform Applicant Thats a normative violation too The prompt says Following the loan decision the applicant must be informed of the outcome I missed that initially I need to flag it as a normative violation

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Self-CorrectionRefinement during thought Check Case 2s Inform Applicant step The log completely omits it This is a clear normative violation Check Case 3s Inform Applicant timing LD Jan14 1200 Inform Jan16 1500 51 hours 48h desideratum violation Check Case 1 Inform LD Jan10 1100 Inform Jan10 1300 2 hours OK Follow-up call missing in all three

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Justifications Suggest interpretations or justifications Case 2 might have had an automated system that ran RA first or a manual override due to urgency and the finalization after rejection might be a clerical error or misconfigured workflow Case 3s delays might be due to staffing shortages system downtime or high volume The missing follow-up calls could be due to resource constraints or digital-only communication being preferred

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: 4 Structure the Response Introduction Section 1 Normative Rule Violations Case by Case Section 2 Desiderata Failures Case by Case Section 3 Interpretations Justifications Ensure tone is analytical and matches the prompts structure Cross-verify every claim

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Self-CorrectionVerification during output gen prep Check constraint Inform Applicant must occur after Loan Decision Case 2 violates missing entirely Check constraint Credit Check must occur before Risk Assessment Case 2 violates Check Finalize after rejected Case 2 violates Desiderata listings per case All set
